Mr. Woods stated that a First and Final account was prepared but that the accountant was unable to complete it. The Court suggested seeking assistance from a Probate Paralegal (list provided). The matter was continued to June 15, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Continued To Feb-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Sixth Preliminary Distribution And Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Wood for Herbert Burbank, Jr.

Mr. Wood stated that the Accountant would have the final account ready by the end of October, that he could file the petition for final distribution by the end of the year, that he hopes all issues are resolved by then and that Mr. Burbank is the only Beneficiary. Status of filing of the petition for final distribution was set for December 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court approved the Petition for Sixth Preliminary Distribution and Status Report (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
